title: シャル・ウィー・ハグ？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While at the mall on my day off, I spot Taiki
Shuttle with some friends at a pet shop.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Are you okay, Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
How could I possibly be okay with this bundle of
cuteness in front of me?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can't hold back any longer! Time to give it a real
good cuddle!

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof, woof! Grr!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Eek! B-but why?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Sniffle... You gotta help me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to comfort Taiki as she explains the situation
through her tears.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka got to hug that little puppy, but it won't
even let me touch its paw...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's breakin' my poor heart... I wish I was Suzuka right now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: U-um... Well... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind giving us some suggestions on
how to get the puppy to warm up to Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Tell me what to do, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Show no fear and hold it with confidence.
Loosen up and relax before you hold it.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Makes sense! I bet the little fella can smell my
fear! Okay—time to give it another whirl!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Listen up, pup! Look me in the eye!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm the sheriff 'round these parts, so what I say
goes! The only laws here are the laws of the Wild
West!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So... you better let me hug you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I think that might have been a bit much...

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof, woof!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, here comes the puppy! It must be lookin' for
a hug!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The puppy has taken a liking to Taiki Shuttle.
Looks like she managed to show it who's boss.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Good idea. Maybe the puppy was just nervous
because Taiki was nervous...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! Okay—I'll get things right this time
around!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Breathe in... and out...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Breathe in... and out...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, Taiki? I think that's enough relaxing...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoops, my bad! Thanks for the heads-up,
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki attempts to hug the puppy again...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh my lucky stars...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad things worked out for you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you just the cutest little thing? Lemme get
another feel of that fluffy fur of yours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like playtime with the puppy is really
helping Taiki Shuttle recover.
